what_it_does: This file is a JSON array that lists six analysis/design documents assigned to the claude-ds project, each with its absolute root directory.
observations: All entries share the same project value 'claude-ds' and root '/home/tim/company/design/claude-ds'
All paths are Markdown files under the 'analysis/' directory
The list includes REQUIREMENTS.md, SYNTHESIS-PLAN.md, SYSTEM-GAPS.md, SYSTEM-MAP-EDITOR-ADAPTER.md, SYSTEM-MAP-ENCODING-GRAMMAR.md, and recent-pitches.md
No code symbols are present; symbols[] is empty
standouts: It groups high-level planning/requirements/system-map documents into one batch
It uses an absolute filesystem root rather than a relative path
It contains no executable code or symbol references
conventions: Uniform JSON object shape with project, path, and root keys
Absolute root path paired with relative file path
Markdown design/analysis documents as the listed artifacts
concerns: Absolute root path is host-specific and may limit portability
No timestamp, batch purpose, or versioning metadata is included
No explanation of why these six files form a batch
notes: A machine-readable manifest of six claude-ds analysis documents grouped for a wave-002 allocation step.
questions: What processing is intended for this batch in wave-002?
Why were these six specific files selected together?
Is the absence of symbols intentional because these are prose documents?
purpose_vs_actual: No stated purpose in the file; it simply enumerates files and their project/root.
intention_signals: It appears to define a processing batch of design/analysis source files so downstream tooling can treat them as a single unit for interpretation or build preparation.
contribution: It contributes a concrete, machine-readable manifest of which design/analysis documents belong to a processing batch, allowing downstream steps to address them as a unit without ambiguity.
summary_for_embedding: A JSON allocation batch listing six Markdown analysis documents under the claude-ds project with their shared absolute root directory.
intention_for_embedding: To enumerate a specific set of design/analysis files as a batch for interpretation or build preparation.
